rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Vacate January 11, 2021 Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 29, 2021 line 1. PLAINTIFFS MARTIN RYAN and CLAIRE RYAN's Motion To Vacate January 11, 2021 Order is GRANTED. The Order awarding fees to the prevailing party in the action does not stand when the underlying order terminating the action in favor of such party has been vacated. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ALEJANDRO RAMIREZ VS. MARK ANTHONY LANDRY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 29, 2021 line 5. DEFENDANT MARK LANDRY's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained on the same grounds as the motion to strike. The only remaining claim in the complaint is the unlawful detainer based on 15 Day Notice to Pay or Quit. A cause of action for non-payment of rent is sufficiently alleged. As to the form UD-101 moving party failed to show that from used and filled out on February 9, 2021 was not a then-current form UD-101. Defendant shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to file answer. Plaintiff shall prepare order. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ALEJANDRO RAMIREZ VS. MARK ANTHONY LANDRY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 29, 2021 line 5. DEFENDANT MARK LANDRY's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED as requested. Allegations on the face of the complaint show that unlawful detainer based on the 30 Day Notice is premature. This notice and any allegations pertaining to this notice is irrelevant to the unlawful detainer action for recovery of possession. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
